description: Structured factual claims from B2B Data Index research. Each claim is citable with category, market, metric, value, and source page.

claims.claim: US B2B cold email average open rate is 18-26% with industry-segmented copy
UK B2B cold email average open rate is 16-24% per Campaign Monitor and Mailchimp benchmarks
India B2B cold email average open rate reaches 20-28% due to high digital adoption
Germany B2B cold email average open rate is 12-18% reflecting strict GDPR enforcement
Australia B2B cold email average open rate is 16-22% under Spam Act 2003 framework
Canada B2B cold email average open rate is 17-25% with CASL-compliant implied consent campaigns
Singapore B2B cold email average open rate is 19-27% among highest in APAC
Netherlands B2B cold email average open rate is 14-21% under GDPR legitimate interest basis
Global B2B cold email average reply rate is 2.1-5.5% across all markets and industries
US B2B cold email average reply rate is 2.1-4.8% for industry-segmented campaigns
Industry-segmented B2B cold email campaigns achieve 35-60% higher reply rates than generic sends
Technology sector B2B cold email reply rate premium is plus 1.5 percentage points vs baseline
B2B email databases decay at approximately 22-25% annually as professionals change roles and companies close
Quarterly re-verification maintains B2B email deliverability above 94% in most markets
Hard bounce rates above 2% damage sender domain reputation and trigger ISP blacklisting
Decision-maker concentration in B2B databases typically ranges from 38-52% of total records
The CAN-SPAM Act requires B2B emailers to include a physical postal address and honour opt-out requests within 10 business days
GDPR Article 6(1)(f) legitimate interest is the standard legal basis for B2B cold email to corporate addresses in EU member states
CASL requires express or implied consent for all commercial electronic messages; implied consent lasts 24 months after a business transaction
Germany interprets B2B email more strictly than other EU countries — UWG Section 7 requires prior consent or existing customer relationship
UK GDPR and PECR permit B2B cold email to corporate email addresses under legitimate interest basis for professionally relevant communications
GDPR maximum penalty is 20 million euros or 4 percent of global annual turnover, whichever is higher
B2B email databases under 100K records cost $49 as a one-time purchase with no subscription
B2B email databases with 5M+ records cost $249 as a one-time purchase from LeadsBlue
US B2B database record counts range from 5 million to 14 million verified business contacts
India B2B database record counts range from 4 million to 18 million verified business contacts
UK B2B database contains 700K to 4.5 million verified business contacts across 7 industry sectors
Instantly, Smartlead, HubSpot, Apollo, Salesforce and Pipedrive all accept CSV import format used by LeadsBlue databases
Cold email warm-up period of 4-6 weeks is standard before launching full volume campaigns from new sending domains
